NSE – ECLERX 
 
With reference to our letter number eClerx/SECD/SE/2020/060 dated August 5, 2020, please note the 
registration link which was provided in the earnings call details for the Unaudited Financial Results for 
the quarter ended June 30, 2020 was not working properly and therefore we are attaching herewith the 
revised earning call details for investors’ convenience. 
 
The same will also be available on the Company’s website www.eclerx.com. 
 
This is for your information and records. 
 
Thanking you, 
 
Yours faithfully 
For eClerx Services Limited

eClerx Services Ltd. to announce Q1 FY20 results on August 12th, 2020;  
Earnings Call to be conducted on the same day 
 
Mumbai, August 5th, 2020: eClerx Services Ltd. (eCx), (BSE: 532927), (NSE: ECLERX), an 
industry-focused Data Analytics and Business Process Management firm, will 
announce its first quarter FY21 results on Wednesday, August 12th, 2020. The 
earnings call for the results would be held on the same day and the earnings details 
will also be available on the company’s website, www.eclerx.com  
 
The Details of Earnings Conference Call are: 
 
Date: August 12th, 2020  
 
Time (IST): 5:30 PM – 6:30 PM 
 
Click Here to Register Zoom Webinar 
After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about 
joining the webinar. 
 
Management Representation from eClerx Services Ltd. 
 
Mr. P. D. Mundhra, Executive Director 
Mr. Anjan Malik, Director 
Mr. Rohitash Gupta, Chief Financial Officer 
 
Participants are requested to log in 10 minutes prior to the start of scheduled call.  
 
About eClerx Services Ltd: 
 
eClerx provides critical business operations, analytics and automation services to some 
of the world’s leading companies across financial services, cable & telecom, retail, 
fashion, luxury, media & entertainment, manufacturing, travel & leisure, software and 
high-tech. Incorporated in 2000, eClerx is one of India’s leading business process 
management and data analytics companies and is today traded on both the Bombay 
and National Stock Exchanges of India. eClerx employs about 8,500 people across its 
global sites in the US, UK, India, Canada, Italy, Germany, Singapore and Thailand. 
eClerx’s technology R&D center in Mumbai was recognized by Govt. of India's 
eClerx Services Limited  
Q1 FY21 Earnings Call Invite  

 
Department for Scientific & Industrial Research. This center does research using 
technologies that include Big-data, Analytics, Machine Learning & Robotics Process 
Automations and has successfully commercialized many leading products including 
our flagship Robotics platform Roboworx®.  
 
For more information, please visit www.eclerx.com 
 
For further information, please contact: 
 
Pratik Bhanushali 
eClerx Services 
Tel: +91 22 6614 8300 
Email: Pratik.Bhanushali@eclerx.com    
Asha Gupta 
Christensen IR 
Tel: +91 22 4215 0210 
Email: agupta@christensenir.com
